series_metadata.series_title: Insurance Company Tax and Assessment Records
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents taxes paid by insurance companies. This series may include, but is not limited to: premiums collected, taxes paid, audits, and assessments.

retention_rules.disposition: 7 Years after end of calendar year, Confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents that requested insurance was not available or not available at an acceptable price from any company licensed to do business in the Commonwealth. This series may include, but is not limited to: affidavits. COV 38.24806

retention_rules.disposition: 5 Years after end of calendar year, Confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents taxes assessed to surplus brokers. This series may include, but is not limited to: premiums collected, taxes paids, audits, and assessments. COV 58.1-2501

retention_rules.disposition: 7 Years after end of calendar year, Confidential Destruction
